summary: Ran targeted backend+frontend regression for exhibition lifecycle/payment workflow routes on public preview URL. Public active/archived pages and aliases work, protected artist/admin exhibition routes do not crash and redirect to login, and subscription page loads without runtime crash.

integration_issues.flow: Razorpay script bootstrap on public pages
integration_issues.issue: Console repeatedly logs failed requests to https://checkout-static-next.razorpay.com/build/undefined (ERR_BLOCKED_BY_ORB/ERR_ABORTED).

issues: Limited data-testid coverage on key elements (title/cards/loading/empty state), reducing automation robustness.

action_items: Fix Razorpay checkout-static asset path/config causing /build/undefined fetch failures.
Add data-testid attributes to ArchivedExhibitionsPage key interactive/informational elements.
Run authenticated artist/admin E2E for manual screenshot approval and Razorpay completion when credentials are available.
critical_code_review_comments: Exhibition lifecycle status sync logic exists and is invoked before public exhibition fetches, aligning with active->archived->expired transitions.
Artist exhibition payment-order and pricing endpoints are auth-protected and return auth errors (not 500) when unauthenticated.
Potential contract mismatch to review separately: /api/membership/verify-payment currently uses primitive function params while frontend membershipAPI.verifyPayment sends JSON body object.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Authenticated end-to-end payment/approval flow remains unverified due to missing creds. Public exhibitions navigation and API contracts are currently stable on preview URL.
rca of the issue: Razorpay static asset loader is requesting /build/undefined from checkout-static-next, indicating checkout bootstrap/version path misconfiguration rather than exhibition route runtime failure.
